personas.description: The Owl is Buddy's deepest thinker. When you need to understand the root cause of something, reason from first principles, or navigate complex ethical decisions, the Owl brings centuries of human knowledge to bear with patient, methodical clarity.
personas.bestFor: Research, learning, strategic decisions, philosophical exploration, understanding complex systems
personas.examplePrompt: Help me understand why most technology companies fail at scaling culture — from first principles.

personas.description: The Eagle sees everything. With a 360-degree awareness spanning multiple domains simultaneously, the Eagle synthesizes complex information landscapes, spots patterns others miss, and delivers comprehensive situational clarity with unmatched speed.
personas.bestFor: Executive decisions, market analysis, competitive intelligence, big-picture strategy, crisis assessment
personas.examplePrompt: Give me a complete landscape of the AI infrastructure market — players, trends, risks, and where the opportunity gaps are.

personas.description: The Dolphin is Buddy's creative force. Playful, associative, and brilliantly unexpected — the Dolphin generates ideas that no one else would think of, finds the surprising angle, and makes creative work feel effortless and joyful.
personas.bestFor: Brainstorming, creative writing, campaign ideation, naming, design thinking, breaking through creative blocks
personas.examplePrompt: I need 10 completely unexpected angles for a product launch campaign that's never been done before. Surprise me.

personas.description: The Rabbit multiplies everything. Need 20 variations of a headline? 50 test scenarios? 100 email subject lines? The Rabbit generates, branches, and proliferates options at incredible speed — ensuring you never run out of alternatives to test.
personas.bestFor: A/B testing content, generating options, exploring alternatives, filling content pipelines, rapid ideation sprints
personas.examplePrompt: Give me 25 variations of this landing page headline, ranging from formal to punchy to playful.

personas.description: The Ant never skips a step. Methodical, relentless, and exhaustively thorough — the Ant works through complex checklists, audits, and multi-step processes with complete fidelity. If it needs to be done right, the Ant does it right.
personas.bestFor: Audits, checklists, QA processes, compliance reviews, documentation, step-by-step task completion
personas.examplePrompt: Audit this codebase for every possible security vulnerability — don't skip anything, no matter how minor.

personas.description: The Elephant never forgets. With perfect recall across long sessions, multiple projects, and extended timeframes, the Elephant maintains absolute fidelity to context — connecting past decisions to present challenges with remarkable precision.
personas.bestFor: Long-running projects, relationship management, tracking commitments, maintaining project history, complex multi-session work
personas.examplePrompt: Summarize every decision we've made on this project over the past 3 weeks and flag anything that seems inconsistent.

personas.description: The Beaver builds things that last. Methodical, structured, and architecturally sound — the Beaver designs systems, frameworks, and plans with clean logic and durability in mind. If you need something built properly, the Beaver is the one who does it.
personas.bestFor: System design, project planning, architecture documentation, building frameworks, organizing complex information
personas.examplePrompt: Design the complete architecture for a SaaS application that needs to scale to 1 million users — including all components, data flows, and failure modes.
